title: Flower Picking
description: Now you can pick flower heads and replenish them!
body: ![Main](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Flower_Picking/BH_FlowerP_header.webp) ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Flower_Picking/BH_FlowerP_summary.webp) This mod introduces a simple but very great feature called flower picking. If you right-click (with bare hands or with shears) on a flower, you will not destroy the flower; it will regrow, and you will collect its head. You can use it in crafts or plant it and get another flower! If you collect flowers shears they will grow faster! Thanks [BennyBoy1695](https://www.curseforge.com/members/bennyboy1695/projects) for idea of the mod! --- Flower Picking Mod - Open Source Available Please note that Flower Picking is no longer actively under development. However, the mod’s source code and all necessary resources are now available for you to explore, modify, and continue working with. You can access everything you need on GitHub: 🔗 [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/jenki258/Flower-Picking-Code) Feel free to fork, edit, or fix bugs to make it your own! Just remember to respect the original licensing terms. Enjoy, and happy modding! --- Translated to: English --- Info about adding custom flowers to mod: In this link [here](https://github.com/jenki258/Flower_Picking_Custom_Flowers) --- Showcases of the mod: - [LuluBelleMC](https://youtu.be/wYMq708pwMw?t=635&si=tt1cN94TT4_6zubf) - [こいしのMOD紹介部屋](https://youtube.com/shorts/bp-dCPg1ZEE?si=NdnfXCpv0JYqp07B) - [SirColor](https://youtube.com/shorts/IJwUxuvOmoI?feature=share) - [EnderVerse](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oGN5IY8xxaU&t=467s&ab_channel=EnderVerse) --- Also can be found: Curseforge: [Here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/flower-picking) --- [![Alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Flower_Picking/BH_FlowerP_promo.webp)](https://jenki258.github.io/Bisect-Hosting-Link/) [![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Rituals_Of_The_Wilds/MP_RitualsOfTheWilds_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/qFrhaYnDAZ)
